ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-21-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt for (petitioner) Mary Dante.

The court inquired as to why the minors gift cannot be bonded and why the estate is being probated if it is less than $150,000.00. Mr. Huysentruyt explained that the cost of bonding the estate would be disproportionate to the amount of the gift ($14,000.00) and that in the trust case, the decedent co-signed for a house with another relative and they want to sell the house and that this is being probated for that reason. The petition for probate of will and letters testamentary is taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)
